enabled__provenance.reason: Composite complexity 3 (>=3 threshold) per meta-analysis-prompt.md JIT Recommendation rule.

max_cycles__provenance.reason: Ambiguity score = 1 (fully specified). No need to inflate beyond default.

dimension_weights__provenance.reason: Correctness-critical PATCH (regression test + exit-code fix + regex gate). Elevated correctness weight; security non-dominant but relevant (path-traversal defense). Sum = 1.00.

skip_phases__provenance.reason: Routing phase_subset (see routing-decision.json). Phase 3 Brainstorming has negligible marginal value for a PATCH with zero open design questions.

active_phases__provenance.reason: Complement of skip_phases. Phase 0 already running; Phases 1-2 locate exact file lines; Phase 4 EARS requirements; Phase 5 TDD; Phase 6 DAG; Phase 7 parallel execute; Phase 8 verify; Phase 9 complete.

approval_gates__provenance.reason: Default gates are [3, 4, 6]. Phase 3 is skipped so its gate drops. Gates 4 (post-spec) and 6 (post-plan) remain active.

mutation_threshold__provenance.reason: No override (ceos-agents has no mutation framework; Phase 5 will log MUTATION_SKIP).

enabled__provenance.reason: Default enabled; structural-metrics oracle will run in Phase 9 if script present.
